source_pr.title: test: skip plan cache for prepared stmt's cache tests
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #16373 

Problem Summary:

Global variable `preparedPlanCacheEnabledValue` may be changed concurrently, make some `prepare statement`  tests unstable, a possible cause for #16373 

### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed:
Disable use cache for these prepare statements, then do tests they will not try to get physical plans from prepared plan cache

How it Works:

### Related changes


- Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test


Side effects



### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

symptoms: PR title: skip plan cache for prepared stmt's cache tests.
failure_signature: PR title: skip plan cache for prepared stmt's cache tests.
fix_pattern: test: skip plan cache for prepared stmt's cache tests

evidence: evidence: PR title: skip plan cache for prepared stmt's cache tests.
evidence: sets PreparedAst.UseCache=false after PrepareStmt so tests are not affected by plan cache state (executor/executor_test.go).
